summary: Complete inventory of all 38 HTML files across 7 GitHub repositories in the UK Lanzarote Repatriation workspace. Each repo section lists every HTML file with its title and description. The bottom summary table now includes a 'GitHub Readme Repo Description' column (between Pages URL and HTML Files count) containing a thorough, content-based description synthesised from scanning every file in each repo directory — suitable for use directly as a GitHub README description.
